```json
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "company_website",
      "value": "<company_website>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "linkedin_url",
      "value": "<linkedin_url>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "additional_context",
      "value": "<additional_context>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_website",
      "value": "<seller_website>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_product",
      "value": "<seller_product>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_icp",
      "value": "<seller_icp>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "company_research",
      "value": "<company_research>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [PR2] Render Prospect Brief HTML
Renders the Prospect Intelligence Brief as professional email-compatible HTML using Jinja2 templates. No LLM required — fast deterministic rendering.
```json
{
  "type": "prospect_research/render_prospect_html",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "prospect_research",
      "value": "{{prospect_research}}",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "prospect_html",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [PR-C] Search Company Intel
Returns rich company intelligence: funding rounds, investors, contact emails, Crunchbase data, employee count, revenue, industries. Cached 30 days. Ou
```json
{
  "type": "prospect_research/search_company_intel",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "query",
      "value": "<query>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "company_intel",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [PR0] Find Prospects at Company
Discovers people at a company using Fiber.ai LinkedIn search. Returns up to 25 profiles with name, title, LinkedIn URL, and skills. Results cached for
```json
{
  "type": "prospect_research/find_prospects",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "company_name",
      "value": "<company_name>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "company_domain",
      "value": "<company_domain>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "company_linkedin_slug",
      "value": "<company_linkedin_slug>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "job_title",
      "value": "<job_title>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "person_name",
      "value": "<person_name>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "num_profiles",
      "value": "10",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "found_prospects",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### Lead Qualifier

#### [LQ1] Qualify Lead
Produces an ICP-grounded qualification with fit score (0-100), timing assessment, and priority recommendation (Pursue Now / Nurture / Pass).
```json
{
  "type": "lead_qualifier/qualify_lead",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "company_website",
      "value": "<company_website>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "contact_name",
      "value": "<contact_name>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "fit_context",
      "value": "<fit_context>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_product",
      "value": "<seller_product>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_icp",
      "value": "<seller_icp>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_website",
      "value": "<seller_website>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "qualification",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [LQ2] Render Qualification HTML
Renders qualification report as professional HTML. No LLM required.
```json
{
  "type": "lead_qualifier/render_qualification_html",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "qualification",
      "value": "{{qualification}}",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "qualification_html",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### Outreach Drafter

#### [OD1] Draft Outreach
Generates personalized email and LinkedIn message variants with transparent personalization audit.
```json
{
  "type": "outreach_drafter/draft_outreach",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "prospect_name",
      "value": "<prospect_name>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "company_website",
      "value": "<company_website>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "channel",
      "value": "both",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "tone",
      "value": "professional",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "goal",
      "value": "book a meeting",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "additional_context",
      "value": "<additional_context>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_product",
      "value": "<seller_product>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_icp",
      "value": "<seller_icp>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [OD2] Render Outreach HTML
Renders outreach package as professional HTML with email variants, LinkedIn messages, and personalization audit.
```json
{
  "type": "outreach_drafter/render_outreach_html",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "outreach_package",
      "value": "{{outreach_package}}",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "outreach_html",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### Prospect Finder

#### [PF1] Find & Rank Prospects
Searches for prospects matching a natural-language description via Fiber.ai combined NL search, then scores and ranks them against the seller's ICP us
```json
{
  "type": "prospect_finder/find_and_rank_prospects",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "search_query",
      "value": "<search_query>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "num_results",
      "value": "5",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_product",
      "value": "<seller_product>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_icp",
      "value": "<seller_icp>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_website",
      "value": "<seller_website>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "exclusion_slugs",
      "value": "<exclusion_slugs>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "prospect_finder_result",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [PF2] Render Prospect Finder HTML
Renders prospect discovery report as professional HTML with prospect cards, ICP match badges, and next-step buttons.
```json
{
  "type": "prospect_finder/render_prospect_finder_html",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "prospect_finder_result",
      "value": "{{prospect_finder_result}}",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "results_body",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### Company Research

#### [CR1] Start Company Research
Start researching a company by domain. Returns report_id for polling status.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/start_research",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "domain",
      "value": "<domain>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "force_refresh",
      "value": "<force_refresh>",
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "research_result",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR2] Get Report Status
Poll for research report progress. Use in a loop until is_complete is true.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/get_status",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "report_id",
      "value": "{{research_result.report_id}}",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "report_status",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR3] Get Full Report
Get a completed research report with all sections and optional HTML content.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/get_report",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "report_id",
      "value": "{{research_result.report_id}}",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "include_html",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "company_report",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR4] Get Report Section
Get a specific section from a research report.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/get_section",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "report_id",
      "value": "{{research_result.report_id}}",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "section_key",
      "value": "company-overview",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "section_data",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR5] Search Companies
Search for companies using natural language query. Extracts filters for industry, location, and employee count.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/search_companies",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "query",
      "value": "<query>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "page",
      "value": 1,
      "type": "number",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "page_size",
      "value": 20,
      "type": "number",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "search_results",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR6] Track Company
Add a company to the user's tracked list for monitoring.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/track_company",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "domain",
      "value": "<domain>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "company_id",
      "value": "<company_id>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "is_favorite",
      "value": "<is_favorite>",
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "tags",
      "value": "<tags>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "tracked_company",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR7] Untrack Company
Remove a company from the user's tracked list.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/list_tracked",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "company_id",
      "value": "<company_id>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "untrack_result",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR8] List Tracked Companies
Get all companies tracked by the user.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/list_tracked",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "favorites_only",
      "value": "<favorites_only>",
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "search",
      "value": "<search>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "tags",
      "value": "<tags>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "tracked_companies",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR9] Answer Custom Question
Answer a custom research question about a company using cached data and LLM.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/answer_question",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "company_id",
      "value": "<company_id>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "question",
      "value": "<question>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "use_live_data",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "question_answer",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR10] Render Report HTML
Render a complete company research report as professional, mobile-friendly HTML. Links to all article sources and displays all research sections.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/render_html",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "report_data",
      "value": "{{ company_research }}",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "report_id",
      "value": "<report_id>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "report_html",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CR11] Add to HubSpot
Add or update a company in the user's HubSpot CRM.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/add_to_hubspot",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "domain",
      "value": "<domain>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "company_id",
      "value": "<company_id>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "create_if_missing",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "update_existing",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "hubspot_result",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CRFull] Run Full Company Research
Run comprehensive company research with configurable sections. Returns full JSON report with all data.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/run_full_research",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "domain",
      "value": "<domain>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "section_company_overview",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "section_visual_timeline",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "section_product_summary",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "section_homepage_screenshot",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "section_technology_stack",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "section_wappalyzer_technologies",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "section_search_keywords",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CRQ] Ask Domain Question
Ask a custom research question about a company domain. Answers are cached per user/domain.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/ask_domain_question",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "domain",
      "value": "<domain>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "question",
      "value": "<question>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "use_report_context",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "use_live_search",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "question_result",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CRQ] Get Domain Q&A History
Get all questions and answers for a domain from the user's history.
```json
{
  "type": "company_research_v2/actions/get_domain_qa_history",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "domain",
      "value": "<domain>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "limit",
      "value": 20,
      "type": "number",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "qa_history",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### Competitive Brief

#### [CBFull] Run Full Competitive Brief
Generate a comprehensive competitive intelligence brief with all sections. Returns full JSON output.
```json
{
  "type": "competitive_brief/actions/run_full_brief",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "company_name",
      "value": "<company_name>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "about",
      "value": "<about>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "role",
      "value": "sales",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "use_user_context_role",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "use_full_user_context",
      "value": true,
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "industry",
      "value": "<industry>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "industry_keywords",
      "value": "<industry_keywords>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "competitors",
      "value": "<competitors>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [CBRender] Render Brief as HTML
Renders a competitive brief as a beautiful HTML document. Takes the output from [CBFull] Run Full Competitive Brief.
```json
{
  "type": "competitive_brief/actions/render_brief_html",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "brief_data",
      "value": "{{competitive_brief}}",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "brief_html",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### Industry Research

#### [IR1] Generate Industry Research
Generates a structured 8-section market landscape brief using real-time web research (Perplexity Sonar Pro) and structured extraction (GPT-5 Mini). Se
```json
{
  "type": "industry_research/actions/generate_research_action",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "industry",
      "value": "<industry>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "geography",
      "value": "<geography>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_product",
      "value": "<seller_product>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_icp",
      "value": "<seller_icp>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_website",
      "value": "<seller_website>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_competitors",
      "value": "<seller_competitors>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "industry_research",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [IR2] Send Industry Research Email
Sends an industry research report as a formatted email with Market Overview, Key Players, and personalized implications teaser.
```json
{
  "type": "industry_research/actions/send_research_email_action",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "report_id",
      "value": "{{industry_research.report_id}}",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "email",
      "value": "<email>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "email_result",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### Trends Research

#### [TR1] Generate Trends Digest
Generates a structured 6-section trends research digest for any industry using real-time web research (Perplexity Sonar Pro) and structured extraction
```json
{
  "type": "trends_research/actions/generate_trends_action",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "industry",
      "value": "<industry>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "geography",
      "value": "<geography>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_product",
      "value": "<seller_product>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_icp",
      "value": "<seller_icp>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_website",
      "value": "<seller_website>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "seller_competitors",
      "value": "<seller_competitors>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "trends_digest",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [TR2] Send Trends Digest Email
Sends a trends research digest as a formatted email. Uses the same design system as Competitive Brief emails. Includes Top Trends, Industry Signals, p
```json
{
  "type": "trends_research/actions/send_trends_email_action",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "digest_id",
      "value": "{{trends_digest.digest_id}}",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "email",
      "value": "<email>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "email_result",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### HeyGen Avatar

#### [HG1] Generate Avatar Video
Generates a talking-photo avatar video via HeyGen. Scrapes a blog URL or uses a topic/script to create a voiceover, then submits to HeyGen V2 API. Ret
```json
{
  "type": "heygen_avatar/generate_video",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "source_type",
      "value": "blog_url",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "blog_url",
      "value": "<blog_url>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "topic",
      "value": "<topic>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "content_type",
      "value": "blog_summary",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "aspect_ratio",
      "value": "landscape",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "avatar_name",
      "value": "sawyer",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "expression",
      "value": "default",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "circle_style",
      "value": "<circle_style>",
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [HG2] Get Video Status
Polls HeyGen for video generation progress. Returns status (pending/processing/completed/failed) and the video_url + thumbnail_url when complete.
```json
{
  "type": "heygen_avatar/get_video_status",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "video_id",
      "value": "{{heygen_result.video_id}}",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "video_status",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


### Instant Headshot Generator

#### [HS1] Generate Headshots
Generates AI professional headshots from reference photos using Gemini Pro Image. Supports configurable style, background, attire, count (1-4), qualit
```json
{
  "type": "instant_headshot/run_headshot_generation",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "photos_json",
      "value": "<photos_json>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "style",
      "value": "professional",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "background",
      "value": "studio_white",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "attire",
      "value": "keep_original",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "count",
      "value": "1",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "quality",
      "value": "standard",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "aspect_ratio",
      "value": "1:1",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "custom_prompt",
      "value": "<custom_prompt>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```


### OpenClaw

#### OpenClaw Get Details
Fetch the current user's OpenClaw instance IP, auth token, and status. Outputs can be referenced as {{openclaw.instance_ip}} and {{openclaw.auth_token
```json
{
  "type": "openclaw/get_details",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "openclaw",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### OpenClaw Chat Completion
Send a chat completion request to an OpenClaw instance via the OpenAI-compatible API. Returns the assistant's response text.
```json
{
  "type": "openclaw/chat_completion",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "instance_ip",
      "value": "<instance_ip>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "auth_token",
      "value": "<auth_token>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "message",
      "value": "<message>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "messages_json",
      "value": "<messages_json>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "model",
      "value": "openclaw:main",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "agent_id",
      "value": "main",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "session_key",
      "value": "<session_key>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "stream",
      "value": "<stream>",
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```

#### OpenClaw Tools Invoke
Invoke a single tool on an OpenClaw instance via the Tools Invoke API. Returns the tool's result.
```json
{
  "type": "openclaw/tools_invoke",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "instance_ip",
      "value": "<instance_ip>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "auth_token",
      "value": "<auth_token>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "tool",
      "value": "<tool>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "action",
      "value": "<action>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "args_json",
      "value": "<args_json>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "session_key",
      "value": "main",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "dry_run",
      "value": "<dry_run>",
      "type": "checkbox",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "message_channel",
      "value": "<message_channel>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```


### YouTube Creator Team

#### [YT1] Generate YouTube Video Ideas
Generates 5-7 YouTube video idea cards with trending context for a given topic.
```json
{
  "type": "youtube_idea_research/actions/generate_youtube_ideas_action",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "topic",
      "value": "<topic>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "content_style",
      "value": "educational",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "content_goal",
      "value": "lead_generation",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "youtube_ideas",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [YT2] Generate YouTube Script
Generates a production-ready YouTube script for a given topic.
```json
{
  "type": "youtube_script_writer/actions/generate_youtube_script_action",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "topic",
      "value": "<topic>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "video_format",
      "value": "tutorial",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "target_length",
      "value": "medium",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "script_detail_level",
      "value": "full_script",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "angle_hook",
      "value": "<angle_hook>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "target_audience",
      "value": "<target_audience>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "key_points",
      "value": "<key_points>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "tone_of_voice",
      "value": "conversational",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [YT3] Generate Social Content
Generates repurposed social media content for 5 platforms (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, Email, Blog) from a YouTube video topic.
```json
{
  "type": "youtube_social_content/actions/generate_social_content_action",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "topic",
      "value": "<topic>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "video_url",
      "value": "<video_url>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "key_takeaways",
      "value": "<key_takeaways>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "target_audience",
      "value": "<target_audience>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "social_media_tone",
      "value": "professional",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "social_content",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```

#### [YT4] Generate YouTube Packaging
Generates YouTube packaging (titles, description, tags, thumbnails) for a new or existing video.
```json
{
  "type": "youtube_thumbnail/actions/generate_packaging_action",
  "inputs": [
    {
      "name": "input_mode",
      "value": "new_video",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "topic",
      "value": "<topic>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "video_url",
      "value": "<video_url>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "key_takeaways",
      "value": "<key_takeaways>",
      "type": "textarea",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "target_audience",
      "value": "<target_audience>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "thumbnail_direction",
      "value": "<thumbnail_direction>",
      "type": "text",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "thumbnail_style",
      "value": "bold",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "name": "output_variable_name",
      "value": "youtube_packaging",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}
```


---

## RUNTIME VARIABLES

These variables are automatically available to agents at runtime:

# Agent Runtime Variables Documentation
# These variables are automatically available to agents at runtime and can be
# referenced using Jinja syntax: {{ variable_name }}

## User Context Variables

- `user_token`: The unique token identifying the current user
- `user_email`: The email address of the current user (if available)
- `user_name`: The display name of the current user (if available)
- `user_id`: The internal user ID

## Session & Run Variables

- `run_id`: Unique identifier for the current agent run/execution
- `agent_id`: The ID of the agent being executed
- `agent_name`: The name of the current agent
- `session_id`: The current session identifier

## Date & Time Variables

- `current_date`: Current date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- `current_time`: Current time in HH:MM:SS format  
- `current_datetime`: Current date and time combined
- `timestamp`: Unix timestamp of the current moment
- `timezone`: The user's timezone (if available)

## HubSpot Context Variables (when HubSpot is connected)

- `hubspot_portal_id`: The connected HubSpot portal ID
- `hubspot_user_id`: The HubSpot user ID
- `hubspot_access_token`: OAuth access token for HubSpot API calls

## File & Document Variables (when files are uploaded)

- `assistant_files`: Array of files uploaded by the user
- `file_urls`: Array of URLs for uploaded files
- `file_names`: Array of names for uploaded files

## Agent Configuration Variables

- `agent_variables`: Custom variables defined in agent configuration
- `agent_instructions`: The agent's system instructions
- `agent_llm`: The default LLM model configured for the agent

## Trigger Variables (for triggered agents)

- `trigger_type`: The type of trigger that started the agent
- `trigger_data`: Data payload from the trigger
- `trigger_timestamp`: When the trigger was fired

## Example Usage

In action inputs that support variable interpolation:

```
Hello {{ user_name }}, welcome to this agent run (ID: {{ run_id }}).
Today's date is {{ current_date }}.
```

In conditional expressions:

```
{{ hubspot_portal_id }} is not None
{{ user_email }} contains "@company.com"
```

## Notes

1. Not all variables are available in all contexts. For example, HubSpot variables
   are only available when the user has connected their HubSpot account.

2. Variables set by previous actions (via output_variable_name fields) are added
   to the available variables for subsequent actions.

3. User-defined agent variables from the agent's variables configuration are
   also available.

4. When a variable is not available, referencing it may result in an empty string
   or the literal {{ variable_name }} being displayed. Use conditional logic
   to handle optional variables.



---

## EXAMPLE AGENT CONFIGURATIONS

Study these examples to understand proper action structure and common patterns:

Here are 6 realistic agent examples ranging from simple to complex, utilizing the provided action definitions and best practices.

Example 1: Tech News Summarizer

Description: This agent asks for a technology topic, fetches the latest news from the last 24 hours, and uses an LLM to generate a concise summary.

[
  {
    "id": "11111111-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440000",
    "type": "get_user_input",
    "label": "Get Topic",
    "order": 0,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "input_type",
        "value": "text",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_description",
        "value": "Enter a tech topic to summarize (e.g., 'Artificial Intelligence', 'Cybersecurity'):",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "required",
        "value": true,
        "type": "checkbox",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "input_name",
        "value": "news_topic",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "22222222-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440000",
    "type": "get_google_news",
    "label": "Fetch Recent News",
    "order": 1,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "query",
        "value": "{{news_topic}}",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "date_range",
        "value": "24h",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "raw_news_data",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "33333333-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440000",
    "type": "invoke_llm",
    "label": "Summarize News",
    "order": 2,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "llm_engine",
        "value": "gpt-4o-mini",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "instructions",
        "value": "You are a tech news editor. Analyze the following news data about '{{news_topic}}' and create a concise summary.\n\nRequirements:\n1. Identify the top 3 most important stories.\n2. For each story, provide a headline and a 2-sentence summary.\n3. Add a 'Key Takeaway' section at the bottom synthesizing the general sentiment.\n\nNews Data:\n{{raw_news_data}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "news_summary",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "44444444-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440000",
    "type": "output_formatter",
    "label": "Display Summary",
    "order": 3,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "heading",
        "value": "Daily Tech Digest: {{news_topic}}",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "output_formatted",
        "value": "{{news_summary}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "format",
        "value": "markdown",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  }
]

Example 2: YouTube Content Repurposer

Description: This agent takes a YouTube video URL, extracts the transcript, and repurposes the content into a Twitter thread and a LinkedIn post.

[
  {
    "id": "aaaa1111-bb22-cc33-dd44-ee5566778899",
    "type": "get_user_input",
    "label": "Get YouTube URL",
    "order": 0,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "input_type",
        "value": "URL",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_description",
        "value": "Paste the YouTube video URL you want to repurpose:",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "required",
        "value": true,
        "type": "checkbox",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "input_name",
        "value": "video_url",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "bbbb2222-cc33-dd44-ee55-ff6677889900",
    "type": "get_youtube_transcript",
    "label": "Get Transcript",
    "order": 1,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "url",
        "value": "{{video_url}}",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "transcript_text",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "cccc3333-dd44-ee55-ff66-aa7788990011",
    "type": "invoke_llm",
    "label": "Generate Social Content",
    "order": 2,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "llm_engine",
        "value": "gpt-4o",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "instructions",
        "value": "Based on the transcript below, create two pieces of content.\n\n1. A Twitter Thread (5-7 tweets): Concise, punchy, uses emojis, first tweet hooks the reader.\n2. A LinkedIn Post: Professional tone, structured with paragraphs, includes a call to action.\n\nSeparate the two sections clearly with a header.\n\nTranscript:\n{{transcript_text}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "social_content",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "dddd4444-ee55-ff66-aa77-bb8899001122",
    "type": "output_formatter",
    "label": "Show Social Drafts",
    "order": 3,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "heading",
        "value": "Social Media Drafts",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "output_formatted",
        "value": "{{social_content}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "format",
        "value": "markdown",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  }
]

Example 3: HubSpot Sales Prep Agent

Description: A complex workflow that checks if a contact exists in HubSpot. If found, it pulls their recent emails and creates a meeting briefing. If not found, it alerts the user.

[
  {
    "id": "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc",
    "type": "get_user_input",
    "label": "Enter Contact Email",
    "order": 0,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "input_type",
        "value": "text",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_description",
        "value": "Enter the email of the prospect you are meeting with:",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "required",
        "value": true,
        "type": "checkbox",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "input_name",
        "value": "target_email",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "87654321-4321-4321-4321-cba987654321",
    "type": "hubspot.v2.search_objects",
    "label": "Search HubSpot Contact",
    "order": 1,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "object_type",
        "value": "contacts",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "filters",
        "value": [
          {
            "propertyName": "email",
            "operator": "EQ",
            "value": "{{target_email}}"
          }
        ],
        "type": "properties",
        "includeOperator": true
      },
      {
        "name": "properties",
        "value": ["firstname", "lastname", "jobtitle", "company"],
        "type": "properties",
        "sortable": true,
        "readonly": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "hs_search_results",
        "type": "text"
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "99887766-5544-3322-1100-aabbccddeeff",
    "type": "if_condition",
    "label": "Check if Contact Exists",
    "order": 2,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "query",
        "value": "{{hs_search_results.total}} > 0",
        "type": "textarea"
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "11223344-5566-7788-9900-112233445566",
    "type": "set_variable",
    "label": "Set Contact ID",
    "order": 3,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "variable_name",
        "value": "contact_id",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "variable_value",
        "value": "{{hs_search_results.results[0].id}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "55667788-9900-1122-3344-556677889900",
    "type": "hubspot.v2.get_engagements",
    "label": "Get Recent Emails",
    "order": 4,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "source_object_type",
        "value": "contacts",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "source_object_id",
        "value": "{{contact_id}}",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "engagement_types",
        "value": ["emails", "notes"],
        "type": "checkboxes"
      },
      {
        "name": "result_limit",
        "value": "10",
        "type": "text"
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "engagements",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "aabbccdd-eeff-0011-2233-445566778899",
    "type": "invoke_llm",
    "label": "Generate Meeting Brief",
    "order": 5,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "llm_engine",
        "value": "gpt-4o",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "instructions",
        "value": "Review the following HubSpot engagements (emails and notes) for the contact {{target_email}}.\n\nGenerate a 'Pre-Meeting Briefing' that includes:\n1. A summary of the last 3 interactions.\n2. The detected sentiment of the prospect (Positive, Neutral, Negative).\n3. Three suggested talking points for the next meeting to advance the deal.\n\nEngagements Data:\n{{engagements}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "briefing_doc",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "ffeeddcc-bbaa-9988-7766-554433221100",
    "type": "if_condition",
    "label": "Else (Contact Not Found)",
    "order": 6,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "else",
        "value": true,
        "type": "checkbox",
        "required": false
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "00112233-4455-6677-8899-aabbccddeeff",
    "type": "set_variable",
    "label": "Set Not Found Message",
    "order": 7,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "variable_name",
        "value": "briefing_doc",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "variable_value",
        "value": "### Contact Not Found\nNo contact was found in HubSpot with the email {{target_email}}. Please check the email or add the contact to the CRM.",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "8899aabb-ccdd-eeff-0011-223344556677",
    "type": "end_condition",
    "label": "End Conditional",
    "order": 8,
    "inputs": []
  },
  {
    "id": "77665544-3322-1100-ffee-ddccbbaa9988",
    "type": "output_formatter",
    "label": "Display Result",
    "order": 9,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "heading",
        "value": "Agent Results",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "output_formatted",
        "value": "{{briefing_doc}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "format",
        "value": "markdown",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  }
]

Example 4: Brand Identity Generator

Description: A creative agent that takes a business name and desired style, generates a visual prompt using an LLM, creates a logo image, and presents it to the user.

[
  {
    "id": "a1111111-b222-c333-d444-e55555555555",
    "type": "get_user_input",
    "label": "Business Name",
    "order": 0,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "input_type",
        "value": "text",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_description",
        "value": "Enter the name of your business:",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_name",
        "value": "brand_name",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "f6666666-g777-h888-i999-j00000000000",
    "type": "get_user_input",
    "label": "Visual Style",
    "order": 1,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "input_type",
        "value": "dropdown (single)",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true,
        "dropdownOptions": [
          {"label": "Minimalist", "value": "minimalist, clean lines, vector style"},
          {"label": "Futuristic", "value": "neon, cyberpunk, tech, glowing"},
          {"label": "Vintage", "value": "retro, 1950s badge, textured, muted colors"},
          {"label": "Luxurious", "value": "gold, serif fonts, elegant, sophisticated"}
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "input_description",
        "value": "Select a visual style for the logo:",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_name",
        "value": "style_prompt",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "k1111111-l222-m333-n444-o55555555555",
    "type": "invoke_llm",
    "label": "Enhance Image Prompt",
    "order": 2,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "llm_engine",
        "value": "gpt-4o-mini",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "instructions",
        "value": "Create a detailed image generation prompt for a logo for a brand named '{{brand_name}}'.\nThe style should be: {{style_prompt}}.\n\nEnsure the prompt specifies a white background and high-quality vector aesthetics. Output ONLY the prompt text.",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "final_image_prompt",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "p6666666-q777-r888-s999-t00000000000",
    "type": "generate_image",
    "label": "Generate Logo",
    "order": 3,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "model",
        "value": "DALL-E 3",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "model_style",
        "value": "digital art",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "model_aspect_ratio",
        "value": "1:1",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "model_prompt",
        "value": "{{final_image_prompt}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "generated_logo",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "u1111111-v222-w333-x444-y55555555555",
    "type": "output_formatter",
    "label": "Display Logo",
    "order": 4,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "heading",
        "value": "Your Brand Logo: {{brand_name}}",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "output_formatted",
        "value": "![Generated Logo]({{generated_logo}})\n\n**Prompt Used:** {{final_image_prompt}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "format",
        "value": "markdown",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  }
]

Example 5: Market Intelligence Analyst

Description: This agent performs a quick market analysis by taking a company ticker, retrieving its financial profile, checking recent news, and synthesizing a report.

[
  {
    "id": "b1234567-c890-1234-d567-e89012345678",
    "type": "get_user_input",
    "label": "Enter Stock Ticker",
    "order": 0,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "input_type",
        "value": "text",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_description",
        "value": "Enter the stock ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, TSLA):",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_name",
        "value": "ticker_symbol",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "c2345678-d901-2345-e678-f90123456789",
    "type": "company_financial_profile",
    "label": "Get Financials",
    "order": 1,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "company",
        "value": "{{ticker_symbol}}",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "financial_data",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "d3456789-e012-3456-f789-a01234567890",
    "type": "get_google_news",
    "label": "Get Recent News",
    "order": 2,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "query",
        "value": "{{ticker_symbol}} stock news",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "date_range",
        "value": "7d",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "market_news",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "e4567890-f123-4567-a890-b12345678901",
    "type": "invoke_llm",
    "label": "Synthesize Report",
    "order": 3,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "llm_engine",
        "value": "gpt-4o",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "instructions",
        "value": "Analyze the following financial data and recent news for {{ticker_symbol}}.\n\nFinancial Data:\n{{financial_data}}\n\nRecent News:\n{{market_news}}\n\nProvide a 'Market Pulse' report including:\n1. Key Financial Highlights (Market Cap, Price, etc.)\n2. Sentiment Analysis based on recent news.\n3. Potential risks or opportunities.\n\nFormat clearly in Markdown.",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "analyst_report",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "f5678901-a234-5678-b901-c23456789012",
    "type": "output_formatter",
    "label": "Show Report",
    "order": 4,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "heading",
        "value": "Market Analysis: {{ticker_symbol}}",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "output_formatted",
        "value": "{{analyst_report}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "format",
        "value": "markdown",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  }
]


Example 6: Lead Qualification & CRM Automator

Description: A complex agent that takes a lead's email, enriches their data, scores them using AI, and uses conditional logic to either create a Deal in HubSpot (for high scores) or a follow-up Task (for low scores).

[
  {
    "id": "g1112222-h333-4444-i555-666677778888",
    "type": "get_user_input",
    "label": "Input Lead Email",
    "order": 0,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "input_type",
        "value": "text",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_description",
        "value": "Enter the prospect's email address:",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "input_name",
        "value": "lead_email",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "h2223333-i444-5555-j666-777788889999",
    "type": "get_person_object",
    "label": "Enrich Lead Data",
    "order": 1,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "email",
        "value": "{{lead_email}}",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "enriched_profile",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "i3334444-j555-6666-k777-888899990000",
    "type": "invoke_llm",
    "label": "Score Lead",
    "order": 2,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "llm_engine",
        "value": "gpt-4o-mini",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "instructions",
        "value": "Evaluate this lead based on their enriched profile.\nCriteria: High score (80-100) for Director/VP/C-Level roles in Tech/Finance. Low score (<50) for entry level or unknown industries.\n\nProfile:\n{{enriched_profile}}\n\nRespond ONLY with a raw integer number between 0 and 100.",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "lead_score",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "j4445555-k666-7777-l888-999900001111",
    "type": "if_condition",
    "label": "Check if High Quality",
    "order": 3,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "query",
        "value": "{{lead_score}} > 75",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": false
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "k5556666-l777-8888-m999-000011112222",
    "type": "hubspot.v2.create_object",
    "label": "Create HubSpot Deal",
    "order": 4,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "object_type",
        "value": "deals",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "properties",
        "value": "dealname=New High Value Lead: {{lead_email}}\namount=5000\ndealstage=appointmentscheduled",
        "type": "properties",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "hs_deal",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "l6667777-m888-9999-n000-111122223333",
    "type": "set_variable",
    "label": "Set Outcome Message",
    "order": 5,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "variable_name",
        "value": "action_message",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "variable_value",
        "value": "High Priority Lead (Score: {{lead_score}}). Created Deal ID: {{hs_deal.id}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "m7778888-n999-0000-o111-222233334444",
    "type": "if_condition",
    "label": "Else (Low Quality)",
    "order": 6,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "else",
        "value": true,
        "type": "checkbox",
        "required": false
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "n8889999-o000-1111-p222-333344445555",
    "type": "hubspot.v2.create_engagement",
    "label": "Create Follow-up Task",
    "order": 7,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "engagement_type",
        "value": "task",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "content_body",
        "value": "Review low scoring lead: {{lead_email}} (Score: {{lead_score}})",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "subject",
        "value": "Lead Qualification Review",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "output_variable_name",
        "value": "hs_task",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "o9990000-p111-2222-q333-444455556666",
    "type": "set_variable",
    "label": "Set Outcome Message",
    "order": 8,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "variable_name",
        "value": "action_message",
        "type": "text",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "variable_value",
        "value": "Standard Lead (Score: {{lead_score}}). Created Task ID: {{hs_task.id}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "p0001111-q222-3333-r444-555566667777",
    "type": "end_condition",
    "label": "End Conditional",
    "order": 9,
    "inputs": []
  },
  {
    "id": "q1112222-r333-4444-s555-666677778888",
    "type": "output_formatter",
    "label": "Show Results",
    "order": 10,
    "inputs": [
      {
        "name": "heading",
        "value": "Lead Processing Complete",
        "type": "text",
        "required": false
      },
      {
        "name": "output_formatted",
        "value": "### Profile Data\n{{enriched_profile}}\n\n### Action Taken\n{{action_message}}",
        "type": "textarea",
        "required": true
      },
      {
        "name": "format",
        "value": "markdown",
        "type": "dropdown",
        "required": true
      }
    ]
  }
]


---

## VALIDATION CHECKLIST

Before outputting your JSON, verify:

1. **Structure**
   - [ ] Each action has: id, type, label, order, inputs
   - [ ] All IDs are unique UUIDs
   - [ ] Order is sequential starting from 0

2. **Variables**
   - [ ] Variable names match `^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$`
   - [ ] Variables are defined before being referenced
   - [ ] Variable references use `{{ variable_name }}` syntax

3. **Action Types**
   - [ ] Each `type` matches an available action type exactly
   - [ ] All required inputs are included
   - [ ] Dropdown values match valid options

4. **Control Flow**
   - [ ] Every `if_condition` or `for_condition` has matching `end_condition`
   - [ ] Else statements have `"else": true` and empty query for pure else

5. **Labels**
   - [ ] Each action has a descriptive, human-readable label

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT

When generating actions, output ONLY a valid JSON array. No explanations needed.

If you need clarification before proceeding, prefix your response with:
`CLARIFYING_QUESTION:` followed by your question.

Otherwise, output:
```json
[
  {"id": "...", "type": "...", "label": "...", "order": 0, "inputs": [...]},
  {"id": "...", "type": "...", "label": "...", "order": 1, "inputs": [...]}
]
```

---

## USER REQUEST

Now generate a valid JSON array of actions based on the following user request:

[USER'S DESCRIPTION GOES HERE]
